tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons) -- Product Owner, auth.feature, , Documentation, shiftdoc-po-auth.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a Product Owner uploads a file and runs analysis with no add-ons selected, the downloaded Markdown file is named to reflect their role and the source filename.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Analysis results are displayed under the correct section heading when no add-ons are used
The filename encodes the user role and source file name correctly when no add-ons are selected

tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons) -- QA Manager, auth.feature, , Documentation, shiftdoc-qam-auth.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a QA Manager uploads a file and runs analysis with no add-ons selected, the downloaded Markdown file is named to reflect their role and the source filename.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Analysis results are displayed under the correct section heading when no add-ons are used
The filename correctly uses the QA Manager role shortcode alongside the source file name

tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons) -- Product Owner, checkout_flow.feature, , Documentation, shiftdoc-po-checkout_flow.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a Product Owner uploads a different source file and runs analysis with no add-ons, the downloaded filename correctly reflects both the role and the new source filename.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Analysis results are displayed under the correct section heading for this source file
The filename adapts to the uploaded source file name, confirming the naming convention works across different files

tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons) -- Product Owner, login.spec.ts, , Documentation, shiftdoc-po-login.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a Product Owner uploads a non-Gherkin test file (.spec.ts) and runs analysis with no add-ons, the downloaded filename uses only the base name without the original extension.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Analysis results are displayed correctly for a non-.feature source file
The filename strips the original file extension and uses only the base name, regardless of the source file type

tests.test_name: Filename appends add-on short codes -- Product Owner, auth.feature, Technical Review, Documentation and Analysis, shiftdoc-po-auth+tr.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a Product Owner selects a single add-on alongside their analysis, the downloaded filename appends the add-on's short code to reflect the enriched output.

test_coverage.verification_step: Panel heading shown as Documentation and Analysis
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The results panel updates its heading to reflect that add-on content is included
A single add-on short code is correctly appended to the filename

tests.test_name: Filename appends add-on short codes -- QA Manager, auth.feature, Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Risk Assessment, Documentation and Analysis, shiftdoc-qam-auth+tr+gap+risk.md

parameters.add_ons: Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Risk Assessment

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a QA Manager selects three add-ons, the downloaded filename includes all three short codes appended in order, confirming multi-add-on naming works correctly.

test_coverage.verification_step: Panel heading shown as Documentation and Analysis
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The results panel reflects that multiple add-ons were included in the analysis
All three add-on short codes are appended to the filename in the correct order

tests.test_name: Filename appends add-on short codes -- QA Manager, auth.feature, Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Annotation Summary, Risk Assessment, Recommendations, Documentation and Analysis, shiftdoc-qam-auth+tr+gap+ann+risk+rec.md

parameters.add_ons: Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Annotation Summary, Risk Assessment, Recommendations

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a QA Manager selects five add-ons, the downloaded filename correctly includes all five short codes, verifying that the naming convention scales to the maximum number of add-ons.

test_coverage.verification_step: Panel heading shown as Documentation and Analysis
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The results panel correctly reflects a fully enriched analysis with five add-ons
All five add-on short codes are correctly appended to the filename without omission or reordering

tests.test_name: Pasted text with no filename falls back to date-time
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a user pastes test content directly instead of uploading a file, the downloaded filename falls back to a date-time stamp since no source filename is available.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Analysis completes successfully when content is pasted rather than uploaded

test_coverage.verification_step: Downloaded file matches date-time pattern shiftdoc-po-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss.md
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The filename uses a date-time fallback when no source file name exists

tests.test_name: Pasted text with add-ons falls back to date-time with add-on suffix
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a user pastes test content with add-ons selected, the downloaded filename combines the date-time fallback with the appropriate add-on short codes.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis shown in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Analysis with add-ons completes successfully when content is pasted rather than uploaded

test_coverage.verification_step: Downloaded file matches date-time pattern with +tr+gap suffix
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Add-on short codes are correctly appended to the date-time fallback filename
